suppress.notes: CVE-2026-42154 applies to the Prometheus server remote-read endpoint. This module uses micrometer-registry-prometheus as a metrics exporter client and does not embed or run the Prometheus server.
CVE-2025-15104 is a false positive CPE match against hibernate-validator. The CVE describes validator.nu (Nu Html Checker), which is not present in this codebase.

CVE-2025-7962 affects SMTP header injection scenarios in mail stacks. Nexra mail sends validated addresses through strongly typed request DTOs and does not expose arbitrary user-controlled mail headers.

CVE-2026-23907 affects the PDFBox ExtractEmbeddedFiles example path handling. Nexra does not call org.apache.pdfbox.examples.* and only uses PDFBox for server-side rendering/protection of generated payslips.

CVE-2026-33929 is a follow-up flaw in the same ExtractEmbeddedFiles example. Maven Central currently exposes 3.0.7 as latest; migrate to 3.0.8+ once released. Nexra is not reachable through the vulnerable example code path.
